lead: Investigate the ownership structure of Example Corp Ltd, registered in BVI
questions: Who is the ultimate beneficial owner?
Are there other related entities registered under the same address?

findings.claim: Example Corp Ltd is registered at Road Town, Tortola, British Virgin Islands, incorporated on 2019-03-14 with registration number 2019-ABC-123.
findings.evidence: "Example Corp Ltd, Company No. 2019-ABC-123, incorporated 14 March 2019, Registered Agent: Acme Trust Services, Road Town, Tortola" — BVI Financial Services Commission filing
findings.confidence_rationale: Primary registry source, archived, access_method full_text.

grounding.misgrounding_risk: Low; the claim restates fields from the registry filing.
grounding.grounding_rationale: The quoted registry filing directly names the company, registration number, incorporation date, registered agent, and location.

findings.claim: The registered agent Acme Trust Services provides incorporation services for at least 43 other companies sharing the same Tortola address, 12 of which are connected to a single ultimate beneficial owner.
findings.evidence: ICIJ Offshore Leaks database returned 43 records for the registered agent 'Acme Trust Services' at the Road Town address; 12 of those records share the same UBO name.
findings.confidence_rationale: Two independent investigative databases converge on the same pattern.

missing_assumptions: The 12-entity cluster identifies one ultimate beneficial owner from primary disclosure records.
grounding.misgrounding_risk: Secondary databases may aggregate or infer relationships from source records not yet inspected directly.
grounding.grounding_rationale: The sources support the shared-agent cluster, but primary UBO documentation is still missing, so the UBO portion is only partially grounded.

gaps: Ultimate beneficial owner name not yet confirmed from primary documents
No court filings located for Example Corp Ltd
next_steps: Cross-reference the 12 UBO-linked entities in OCCRP Aleph for press mentions
Search court records in jurisdictions where Example Corp Ltd has done business

monitoring_recommendations.criteria: new director appointments or address changes
monitoring_recommendations.rationale: F1 — registry filings update periodically; watch for ownership changes
